summary: App, SaaS, and UI-first offer placements where the product interface is the proof.
whenToUse: Use when the offer is a digital product, app, SaaS workflow, dashboard, internal tool, or AI feature and the visual needs to prove value through the interface rather than generic software metaphors.
requiredInputs: workflow or job to be shown
UI, data, privacy, and brand constraints
riskGates: Do not invent real customer names, private data, or unsupported metrics.
Keep text sparse and directional unless exact UI copy is supplied.
Avoid generic abstract SaaS glow when the brief needs product proof.
